<?php namespace LiveControl\EloquentDataTable; use Illuminate\Support\ServiceProvider; class EloquentDataTableServiceProvider extends ServiceProvider { /** * Indicates if loading of the provider is deferred. * * @var bool */ protected $defer = false; /** * Register the service provider. * * @return void */ public function register() { // } public function boot() { $this->package('livecontrol/eloquent-database'); } /** * Get the services provided by the provider. * * @return array */ public function provides() { return []; } }
